mapper.sql: id, alert_id, event_id, attack_id, source_ip, attack_type, alert_level, alert_title, alert_content, status, is_suppressed, suppress_until, confirm_by, confirm_time, ignore_reason, ignore_by, ignore_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_alert WHERE attack_id = #{attackId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_alert WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY alert_level, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_alert SET status = 1, confirm_by = #{confirmBy}, confirm_time = #{confirmTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_alert GROUP BY status
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_alert WHERE id IN
#{id}
